text: Welcome to the advanced toolbar tutorial! Let's explore each tool.

onEnter: const tb = document.getElementById('top-toolbar'); if(tb && tb.classList.contains('hidden')) { tb.classList.remove('hidden'); tb.classList.add('flex'); }
text: This is the Add Root Node button. It drops a brand new core concept right into the center of your view.
The Arrange button runs a force-directed organic layout algorithm. It untangles messy webs by pushing unrelated nodes apart and pulling linked ones together.
Made a mistake with Arrange or manual dragging? The Undo button instantly snaps your entire constellation back to its previous layout state.
The Focal toggle controls auto-panning. When active, clicking any node will automatically drift the camera to center on it.

onEnter: const tb = document.getElementById('top-toolbar'); if(tb && !tb.classList.contains('hidden')) { tb.classList.add('hidden'); tb.classList.remove('flex'); }
text: That's all the main tools! You're ready to start building complex knowledge graphs.
